title: Meade County, Kentucky Jailer Training Records

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Kentucky Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

For all Training Records for the current Meade County Jailer John J Scarborough, between 2014 to the date of processing this request.

The records responsive to this request are likely available in a database, or in some query-able format. If your department or agency does not have direct access to the records, please raise to the respective department that can run queries directly (eg, through SQL).

Should your agency not have all of the requested records within a single record or document, please provide me the relevant documents that do, even if that requires more than one class of document. Should some of the records be unavailable, please let me know ahead of time so that we can narrow the request accordingly.

As the records responsive to this request are imperative for understanding how search warrants are executed, I ask that the public interest of these records be evaluated to the extent that the public's interest outweighs this request's burden. To add, this request is being sent to the largest city of every state and will be collated together to create a comprehensive map of search warrants throughout the US. As such, the records are not only important for understanding search warrants at a local level, but also at a national and state-wide level.

Please ensure that provided documents comply with Section 508, as these records will be shared with members of the public who are covered under the ADA. This guide should be helpful: https://www.hhs.gov/web/section-508/making-files-accessible/checklist/pdf/index.html

If this request was sent to the wrong department or agency, please let me know so that I can send to the correct place.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Daniel Boquist @ Freeman Press

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Daniel L Boquist

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Tennessee Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I respectfully request access to and copies of all records related to the procurement of a school bus stop-arm camera associated with: 

Solicitation/Bid: RFQ# 398393 , 2 
Title/Description: Metro Nashville Public Schools Camera System for Bus Fleet

Issuing Entity: Metro Nashville Public Schools, Purchasing Department

Specifically, I am requesting: 

All proposals and responses submitted by all vendors. 

All contracts, agreements, amendments, addenda, and pricing schedules resulting from this solicitation. 

All evaluation materials, including scoring sheets, evaluation committee notes or summaries, and recommendation memoranda. 

All bid tabulations, comparison matrices, or award justifications. 

All addenda to the solicitation, and any questions and answers (Q&A) or clarifications issued to vendors. 

Any other documentation or correspondence (including emails, letters, or internal memoranda) material to the evaluation, selection, and award of this stop-arm camera enforcement program. 

If any portion of the requested records is exempt from disclosure, please provide the non-exempt portions and cite the specific statutory basis for each withholding or redaction. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your acknowledgment. 

 Regards,
Jon Smith

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Kent Hoover, a citizen of Tennessee, in coordination with Jon Smith.

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Rhode Island Access to Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I respectfully request access to and copies of all records related to the procurement of a school bus stop-arm camera / school bus infraction detection system associated with: 

Solicitation/Bid: RFP # 2025-28

Title/Description: NKSD FY26 Bus Cameras RFP School Bus Cameras and GPS

Issuing Entity: North Kingstown School Department Transportation

Specifically, I am requesting: 

All proposals and responses submitted by all vendors. 

All contracts, agreements, amendments, addenda, and pricing schedules resulting from this solicitation. 

All evaluation materials, including scoring sheets, evaluation committee notes or summaries, and recommendation memoranda. 

All bid tabulations, comparison matrices, or award justifications. 

All addenda to the solicitation, and any questions and answers (Q&A) or clarifications issued to vendors. 

Any other documentation or correspondence (including emails, letters, or internal memoranda) material to the evaluation, selection, and award of this stop-arm camera enforcement program. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your acknowledgment.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jon Smith

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

To Whom It May Concern:
Pursuant to the Ohio Freedom of Information Law I hereby request the following records:
Unofficial copies of any documents of complaints, reports, records and actions taken (any info allowable by law) regarding the referral by the Georgia Attorney General’s office attached below concerning the agency and individuals listed.  Any police responses or calls to the residence.


All copies of any and all documents submitted to, filed with, or otherwise in the possession of any public office,  including but not limited to records connected to any complaints, investigations, or actions taken under law relating to the below entities:



Central Conference of American Rabbis - OH Registration #26991
EIN: 13-1769747
NY State Registration Number - 05-99-38
Recently changed address:
183 Madison Ave #1504
New York, NY 10016
355 LEXINGTON AVE 8th Floor, null
NEW YORK , NY 10017

And 

CCAR Representative - Residence of Loren Filson Lapidus
7585 South Spalding Lake Dr. Sandy Springs 30350

If any portion of the requested records is withheld, I request that all reasonably segregable, non-exempt portions be provided, with redactions.

Below is a referral from the Georgia Attorney General.  Please include any documentation related to this referral.

—-------------------------------

Incident Referral from Georgia Attorney General:

Quorum Control 6/24/2024 7:57:11 AM Attached People Record - '7569159 - Ms. Julie Guilfoyle'. Quorum Control 6/24/2024 7:57:11 AM Created Service Quorum Control 6/24/2024 7:57:11 AM Created by IMA Incoming 99997.

Quorum Control 6/24/2024 7:57:13 AM Invalid Workflow Code 'OTHER'.

Quorum Control 6/24/2024 7:57:13 AM Reassigned Ownership to User(s): Web Mail.

IMA Review 6/27/2024 4:21:55 PM Reassigned Ownership to User(s): M. Abram-Cook.

M. Abram-Cook 7/2/2024 1:33:13 PM Acquired Ownership.

M. Abram-Cook 7/2/2024 1:36:38 PM Attached People Record - '7569947 - Central Conference of American Rabbis'. IMA Review 7/2/2024 3:10:02 PM Reassigned Ownership to User(s): H. Logan.

H. Logan 7/11/2024 1:05:21 PM Acquired Ownership.

H. Logan 7/11/2024 1:14:34 PM

INT - Simple Response v.2 / bus =Central Conference of American Rabbis and Loren Filson Lapidus *edit the letter to read:

The Office of the Attorney General, Consumer Protection Division received your complaint and has reviewed your statement regarding the inaction of the Central Conference of American Rabbis and current chair of the Ethics Committee, Loren Filson Lapidus. Our office understands your concerns and takes allegations of child abuse and the failure to report it seriously.

Unfortunately, the situation you have described falls outside the scope of the laws this Division enforces. Please note that this is not a comment on the legitimacy of your allegations; it is simply to state that your allegations should be addressed by some other entity.

To report this allegation further, we strongly suggest that you contact local law enforcement. The Atlanta Police Department can be contacted at Atlanta Public Safety Headquarters, 226 Peachtree St SW, Atlanta, Georgia 30303. The appropriate county sheriff's office would be determined by Ms. Lapidus' residence address since Atlanta covers several counties.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and we regret that we cannot be of further assistance. IMA Review 7/11/2024 6:39:21 PM Reassigned Ownership to User(s): C. Millican.

C. Millican 7/12/2024 9:19:53 AM Reassigned Ownership to User(s): IMA Review. IMA Review 7/16/2024 7:00:12 PM Acquired Ownership.

IMA Review 7/26/2024 12:37:19 PM Deleted Mail '2909685'.

IMA Review 7/26/2024 12:47:45 PM Reassigned Ownership to User(s): T. Bradfield.

T. Bradfield 7/26/2024 12:48:02 PM Acquired Ownership.

T. Bradfield 7/26/2024 12:48:44 PM Added Mail 2911937 (Status: Completed)

T. Bradfield 7/26/2024 12:52:40 PM Reassigned Ownership to User(s): IMA Review.

IMA Review 7/30/2024 1:29:03 PM Acquired Ownership.

IMA Review 7/31/2024 12:26:53 PM This Service was Closed with the 'REF O- LAW ENFORCE' Status Code on 7/31/2024 12:24 PM by IMA Review.

—---------------------------------------

I request that I be properly classified as a news media requester. I am a complainant and a writer for the Times of Israel and I am requesting this information in that editorial capacity.  The Times of Israel is widely recognized for its reporting, publishing regular features on issues of public interest and importance.  The information may also be used in a documentary that is currently being filed.  You may view my articles at the address listed:  https://blogs.timesofisrael.com/author/julie-guilfoyle/
If you have any questions about my media status, please contact me.
In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request be filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.  If there is a large cost, then as an alternative, I request for the records to be made available for inspection.
Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request.
Sincerely,
Julie Guilfoyle

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Julie Guilfoyle

communications.subject: North Carolina Public Records Law Request: Records Request
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the North Carolina Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I respectfully request access to, and copies of all records related to the procurement of a school bus stop-arm camera associated with: 

Solicitation/Bid: RFP# 218-11-26

Title/Description: NHCS Stop Arm Violation Program

Issuing Entity: New Hanover County Schools

Specifically, I am requesting: 

All proposals and responses submitted by all vendors. 

All contracts, agreements, amendments, addenda, and pricing schedules resulting from this solicitation. 

All evaluation materials, including scoring sheets, evaluation committee notes or summaries, and recommendation memoranda. 

All bid tabulations, comparison matrices, or award justifications. 

All addenda to the solicitation, and any questions and answers (Q&A) or clarifications issued to vendors. 

Any other documentation or correspondence (including emails, letters, or internal memoranda) material to the evaluation, selection, and award of this stop-arm camera enforcement program. 

If any portion of the requested records is exempt from disclosure, please provide the non-exempt portions and cite the specific statutory basis for each withholding or redaction. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your acknowledgment.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Jon Smith
